name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: Session 83 closed out: 8 of 10 Genius Hit List items shipped at quality bar. Unified cross-portal shell (assets/portal-shell.css) with shared tokens + primitive classes + tablet breakpoint, linked from /vault-member/, /investor-portal/, /studio-hub/. Canonical Georgia serif + -0.02em letter-spacing enforced on all h1/h2. 768-1024 tablet breakpoint applied to membership tier grid + investor KPI strip + portal primitives. Testimonials + live outcomes + rank distribution on /membership/ with honest empty states (no fabricated quotes). Forge Feed on /vault-wall/ reading /api/public-intelligence.json. World-gravity rails wired onto /games/ + /universe/ hubs. Leaderboard ItemList JSON-LD + seasons countdown + nearest-rival callout on /vault-wall/. Dual-URL Lighthouse CI (local-preview authoritative + Hetzner staging advisory). Two items HAR-deferred after preflight: Ask IGNIS (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) and the 3-item edge-gate/CSP-nonce/rate-limit bundle (CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN unlocks all three).
nextMilestone: Watch first post-push Lighthouse run (S82+S83 combined budgets + new dual-URL gate) and playwright-axe run (new local-preview path). If budgets short, iterate once. Then seed data/member-voices.json with 3-4 real Genesis member quotes (content-only, zero-code conversion lift) and extend Forge Feed + seasons into the shared public-intelligence contract once Studio Hub becomes a second consumer. CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN still the highest-leverage single founder action (unlocks 3 Tier 1 items).
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing — blocks edge-gating private portals, CSP nonce migration, and rate-limit/CSRF on forms (3 S80 Tier 1 infrastructure items)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing in Supabase edge-function secrets — blocks Ask IGNIS concierge and future AI surfaces
Annual Stripe plan keys still do not exist, so annual checkout remains an honest preview only
